textByHash.d4c1aab519b76160589ebfcfcdfd93ac56303691: Amascut's hold on me is finally at an end. Human, let us return to the Nexus.
textByHash.3887ad4c1c6787789080c6e847afb22db5a8ec9e: I'm sure you will find a conversation with me more appealing than one with Scabaras. Still, I leave most of the talking to Apmeken.
textByHash.76eb49aec0546f0d6a494dce037039629c003a15: Now, I can't support you in your fight, but if you can free the others, we'll be able to open the way to Amascut.
textByHash.fa7d245d47b23f9b4869df11a5b46af72bb077c0: Now, we've opened the way to Amascut, but we can do no more. From here, it's up to you.
textByHash.c513d1a30a45eb4b4fbd548f24588b10f40f4cde: Human, I can't support you in your fight, but if you can free the others, we'll be able to open the way to Amascut.
textByHash.2fc24add58ea51bec47c0e93236c540cd00ec81a: Human, we've opened the way to Amascut, but we can do no more. From here, it's up to you.
textByHash.6346771227b40907113d7bdd5ce5402ce3bb3f6b: Scabaras walks his own path. Do not consider his absence an insult. This is his way.
textByHash.a242a8f782a4493a6f585bd3e049f52a94814e3a: If you do, now is the time to ask them.
textByHash.220922d84eec51a409fa29300e28558bd2e73f7d: I am Tumeken's avatar of resourcefulness.
textByHash.6bbdf5cfc56e9257eae9d49b5ee7b6fc0be13828: Meaning my job is to guide the people of the desert not to live lives of excess.
textByHash.ef366ebdd2ca49578e21dc0fa0aafa31fa506208: Much of the desert has forgotten the importance of modesty in my absence, but the situation in Menaphos is definitely the most concerning. Let us hope it can soon be rectified.
textByHash.05c036fcc370d67ed6a75d3f9fdcf02153ab237e: The life of a crocodile is not an easy one. They must seek food wherever it is available.
textByHash.57ed1569bc3f46db3d4fb5712c8ab5ee179d107b: Besides, I sense you do not speak the whole truth. Did you not befriend a crocodile yourself in times past?
textByHash.8a9aa6dcd7e391da4be45e563d318969315810b6: Then perhaps crocodiles are not as rude as you think.
textByHash.44835767f2a2ec2c65cf378c12078f0e226470cb: Whatever path she takes, we will be ready.
textByHash.0d7621be6cfc972ca817dc4c5d5a65fa25731474: It seems unlikely, but there is one who might be able to change that.
textByHash.6622d49ba6428f0c26180630a18a956c88635dbe: That is not for us to discuss.
textByHash.1f7477d629655c17dcbee69a16aff90464ed6dca: Indeed, but they would not be truly correct.
textByHash.b03b8460ca933fcbf0efd7b3b546e09e9719b890: But that does not make us gods. While great, our power is insignificant compared to a true god. That is why they are gone, and we remain.
textByHash.8f75464687f0b3285232c2e6c857451b7ec26051: But again, they are not true gods.
textByHash.a066995a81487ba2662b9e01b372b27fc42a67fe: We are the Avatars of Tumeken, and the Kharidian Desert has been without guidance for too long. It is time we fixed that.
textByHash.a29875011491abfdc019876b8c45d9f9cd6f8735: For now though, this is goodbye. We will meet again, human.
textByHash.d002e27b094f5249d1aa5cb8fd536955af6b37b8: If you have questions, now is the time to ask them.
